instruction: Create a visionOS 26 immersive space that combines a custom RealityKit particle system with spatial audio, triggered by a complex multi-finger gesture.
Build a visionOS 26 app that uses ARKit for hand tracking to manipulate a 3D object in a RealityKit immersive space.
Demonstrate best-practice architecture for a visionOS 26 immersive app using MVVM, combining RealityKit, SwiftUI, and AVFAudio for a spatial music visualizer.
Create a visionOS 26 immersive space that uses RealityKit's collision detection to trigger a spatial audio effect when two objects collide.
Build a visionOS 26 immersive app that uses advanced gesture recognition to allow users to draw in 3D space with their finger, rendering the path in RealityKit.
Demonstrate how to synchronize multiple users in a shared visionOS 26 immersive space using RealityKit's MultipeerConnectivity integration.
Create a visionOS 26 immersive app that overlays real-time device sensor data (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) in 3D space using SwiftUI and RealityKit.
Build a visionOS 26 immersive app that uses advanced occlusion techniques in RealityKit to hide virtual objects behind real-world geometry.
Demonstrate a visionOS 26 immersive app that integrates ARKit's face tracking with RealityKit to animate a 3D avatar in real time.
Create a visionOS 26 immersive app that uses RealityKit's physics engine to simulate a complex chain reaction with multiple interacting objects.
Build a visionOS 26 immersive app that combines RealityKit, AVFAudio, and CoreMotion to create a spatial audio experience that changes based on device orientation.
